heading: Add Query Limits
body:
You can configure limits on the amount of data processed for your
queries from the Atlas CLI, Atlas UI, and API (Application Programming Interface).

Atlas CLI

To create a new Data Federation query limit using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas dataFederation queryLimits create <name> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas dataFederation queryLimits create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-dataFederation-queryLimits-create).

UI
